name: HubSpot for Startups
summary: CRM and marketing platform offering tiered discounts for early-stage and funded startups.
benefits: 90% off Year 1 (for Seed/Series A with partner affiliation or verified funding)
30% off Year 1 (for startups in entrepreneurial organizations)
Access to AI-powered Breeze agents for marketing and sales
eligibility: Pre-seed, Seed, or Series A funding status
Affiliated with approved partners (VCs, accelerators, etc.)
Funding verified via Pitchbook or Crunchbase
